items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aims to validate the outcome of sensitive data masking in extension logs, but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this specific requirement. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any checks or validations that confirm the implementation or functionality of sensitive data masking. Therefore, the assessment cannot definitively conclude whether the requirement is satisfied or not.
